svg.title: Adaptive sidebar concept for Composer
svg.desc: Adaptive songwriting navigation with expanded and contracted sidebar states. The left sidebar can contract to an icon rail that preserves navigation awareness. The contextual right sidebar can be hidden completely and restored with a chevron. The existing Compose workspace is shown unchanged for context.

g.text: Setup when it matters. The workbench when you are writing.
The rail changes emphasis after the song foundation is complete—without hiding it or breaking the original order.
setup order at the right time.
keep it open for the session.
Setup edits update the Creative Compass everywhere
Navigation remains visible; contextual help may leave entirely.
Existing workspace gains the released width
Contracts to icons so location and switching remain available.
Hides fully because it is contextual, with a persistent restore handle.
Each side remembers its own state.
